# section 1: PickleBuffer construct/bytes/raw/release
PickleBuffer
b'hello world'
11
b'hello world'
ValueError: operation forbidden on released PickleBuffer object
# section 2: PickleBuffer wraps bytearray and memoryview too
b'abc'
b'xyz'
# section 3: PickleBuffer namespace presence
True
# section 4: compile()/exec(str)/eval(str) error class is SyntaxError
compile -> SyntaxError
exec -> SyntaxError
eval -> SyntaxError
done
